title: passiflora glandulosa var. canaliculata
intro: Passiflora glandulosa var. canaliculata is a variety of the Passiflora glandulosa plant, commonly known as the 'purple passionflower' or 'yellow passionflower'. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its sedative and anxiolytic properties. The health benefits of Passiflora glandulosa var. canaliculata include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and potentially alleviating symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. In herbal preparations, Passiflora glandulosa var. canaliculata is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also combined with other herbs to create sleep-promoting and calming remedies.
